details.test: Task 1: Signup with Central time zone and no marketing emails
Task 2: Signup and choose cheapest camera+remote plan under $15/month
Task 3: Home setup with 2 rooms and 3 devices (1 thermostat, 2 lights)
Task 4: Configure notifications with push-only alerts and quiet hours
Task 5: Add 3 household members with roles and access
Task 6: Privacy diagnostics + analytics, no third-party or ads
Task 7: Set security PIN with lock protection and lockout
Task 8: Create weekday Good Morning automation for kitchen lights at 7:00 AM
Task 9: Signup and choose annual plan with monthly equivalent under $10
